main.description: Admin-role-only. Trigger the §F4 retention sweep on demand. Loops batched DELETEs until no more old rows match the configured `retention_days` cutoff. The scheduled-fire path (daily at the configured UTC hour) does NOT use this endpoint and does NOT audit; only operator-initiated runs through this endpoint write an audit_log row (action=`retention_sweep`, actor_did=JWT iss). Callers with the `mod` role receive Forbidden.

rowsDeleted.description: Total rows deleted across all batches.

batches.description: Number of batched DELETE round-trips issued.

durationMs.description: Wall-clock duration of the full sweep, in milliseconds.

retentionDaysApplied.description: Cutoff days actually applied. Absent when the labeler was started with no retention cutoff configured (sweep is a no-op in that case).
